title: physaliastrum heterophyllum
intro: Physaliastrum heterophyllum, also known as the forked-flowered or heterophyllous Physaliastrum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Physaliastrum heterophyllum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in herbal capsules and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
